candidate_definitions.text: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

Integrate Git version control with automatic commit-and-sync and other advanced features in Obsidian.md
A powerful community plugin for [Obsidian.md](Obsidian.md) that brings Git integration right into your vault. Automatically commit, pull, push, and see your changes — all within Obsidian.
Hide Obsidian UI elements such as tooltips, status, titlebar and more
This plugin enables you to hide certain parts of the Obsidian UI. Note that your CSS theme may override Hider.
Minimal Theme for Obsidian Publish

Minimal Publish is a stripped-down version of [Minimal Theme](https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-minimal) for [Obsidian Publish](https://obsidian.md/publish). The theme was rewritten from scratch to optimize loading speed.
A foundational Obsidian theme as the baseline of your thoughts.

An initiative to standardize the Alternative Checkboxes feature commonly used by the community in Obsidian.md
A minimalist theme for Obsidian.md, with the aim of creating a serene space of retreat, for thought and uninterrupted work.

- The sidenote syntax has changed (they are now callouts. Example: `>[!aside|left]` will give a left aligned callout. If you want to make it go further left, you can add up to 5 `+` next to the `left` information (for example: `>[!aside|left +++++]` will push the sidenote to the…

A colorful unique theme, giving Obsidian a fresh new look with glow effects and support for accent color. The theme now tries to provide a unique futuristic eye-candy look to obsidian while keeping it usable and familiar to the users. Made to be yours to tweak.

This plugin adds a `data-tag-name` attribute to all top-level preview `div`s, allowing contextual typography. Note: this plugin does not add any styles, but enables contextual styling.
Converts quotes to curly quotes, dashes to em dashes, and periods to ellipses

a collection of CSS snippets for the note taking application Obsidian
This repository is a collection of CSS snippets for the note taking application Obsidian.
An Obsidian theme inspired by the beautifully-designed app, Things.
V1 of this theme was built using code from **@kepano's** great Minimal theme. Please support @kepano's work!
Welcome to the ObsidianMD CSS Snippets repository, a collection of CSS code snippets to enhance the user interface elements of ObsidianMD
ObsidianMD CSS Snippets Collection: Enhance Your Note-Taking Experience
Theme designed with readability and customizability in mind. Change it easily to your liking with the Style Settings plugin installed.
> Theme for my Obsidian Story Vault: **In The Shadows**.
Spotlight your active pane
This is a plugin for [Obsidian](https://obsidian.md) that spotlights your active pane to make it more obvious.
Andy Matuschak Mode as a plugin

![Sync with Todoist Plugin for Obsidian](./docs/static/img/social-card.jpg)
Simple calendar widget for Obsidian.
This plugin for [Obsidian](https://obsidian.md/) creates a simple Calendar view for visualizing and navigating between your daily notes.
Create markdown-backed Kanban boards in Obsidian.
**The Kanban plugin is looking for new maintainers.** Interested? [Read more here.](https://github.com/mgmeyers/obsidian-kanban/blob/main/MAINTAINERS.md)

Zotero plugin that links your Markdown database to Zotero. Jump directly from Zotero Items to connected Markdown files. Automatically tags Zotero Items so you can easily see which papers you've made notes for.

[![GitHub release (latest by date)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/daeh/zotero-markdb-connect?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/daeh/zotero-markdb-connect/releases/latest) [![GitHub Downloads all releases](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/daeh/zotero-markd…
Create/manage your daily, weekly, and monthly notes in Obsidian
The Periodic Notes plugin expands on the idea of daily notes and introduces weekly and monthly notes.
Insert and import citations, bibliographies, notes, and PDF annotations from Zotero into Obsidian.

Insert and import citations, bibliographies, notes, and PDF annotations from Zotero into Obsidian. Requires the [Better BibTeX for Zotero](https://retorque.re/zotero-better-bibtex/installation/) plugin.
